commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=39d8472b6600c8382a6f57c9cb47c6eb7b74f474)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a view-local chat composer draft mirror, commits it on send/Enter/blur/history/slash transitions, and updates chat view tests for draft sync behavior.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +55. Total +110 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: type an ordinary idle draft, do not blur or send, then trigger teardown/reload; the patch has not moved that text into host.chatMessage, while teardown persistence flushes only host chatMessage snapshots. I did not run browser proof in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer draft PR has a focused state-durability blocker that should be addressed or intentionally accepted before merge.

target.title: perf(ui): keep chat draft local while typing
target.body:
## Summary
- Keep ordinary chat composer typing in a view-local draft mirror instead of writing every keystroke into the top-level `chatMessage` state.
- Commit the mirrored draft synchronously before send, Enter send, blur, history navigation, and slash-command transitions so canonical host state stays exact where it matters.
- Add regression coverage for local draft send/Enter/blur sync, unrelated rerenders, and host-driven draft replacement.

## Verification
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --pretty false --noEmit`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --pretty false --noEmit`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
target.author: vincentkoc
